roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SENT
DEF BAIL HEARING MOTION & ORDER RLS ON O,R, OR BAIL REDUCTION - FILEDDEF OPP TO DA MOT TO DETAIN DEF WITHOUT BAIL FILED

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL: PPRF COMPLIANCE & FILING OF CR-110 & CR-111/PPRFCOMP/CTORD:RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $205,00 IS PAYBLE TO VICTIM MICHELLE CHEUNG/X:CR-110AND 111 ARE SIGNED AND FILED/CTORD:DEFENDANT ORDERED THROUGH COUNSEL TO REPORT TO COLLECTIONS, ROOM 101, WITHIN ONE WEEK OF THIS ORDER/

/CAL SENTENCING/AJW/CH6 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 96D/CTS  96/WS/WEAP/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO JOIN THE TRANSITIONAL AGE YOUTH UNIT/SA1:MABEL YEUNG & MICHELLE YEUNG/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION ASTO VICTIM MABEL CHEUNG/X:AS TO VICTIM MICHELLE CHEUNG, THE DEFENDANT HAS AGREED TO PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $205/CTORD:THE SENTENCE IN COUNT 7 SHALL BE IDENTICAL TO THAT OF COUNT 6 & RUN CONCURRENTLY EXCEPT AS TO THE MATTER OF THE FINES & FEES/CTORD:THE FOLLOWING FINES & FEES ARE IMPOSED AS TO COUNT 7 /VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA 40/ICNA/DISM3/CONTD PPRF COMPLIANCE & FILING OF CR-110 & CR-111/DOPU:PPRF COMPLIANT/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 006, 245(A)4PC, A FELONY AND ADD COUNT 007, 484(A) A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTSENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   006, 007/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 02-18-20/PPRFCUST/TWS/REMA/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X:EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X:ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-17-20/987,2/NB/X:COURT GRANTS MOTION TO DETAIN/SA1:MABEL CHEUNGAND MICHELLE CHEUNG/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:TO SET IN DEPT 20/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY INDICATES TIME ESTIMATE FOR HEARING ISUNDER TWO HOURS,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPARTMENT 12/DOP/
